tools.name: outlook_draft
tools.description: Create a draft email in Outlook. The draft will appear in Outlook Drafts for user review. Use in_reply_to with an Outlook message ID to create a reply draft.

in_reply_to.description: Outlook message ID to reply to. Creates a reply draft that preserves the conversation thread.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Outlook accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: outlook_send_draft
tools.description: Send an existing Outlook draft. Only use when the user has reviewed and explicitly approved sending.

draft_id.description: Outlook draft message ID to send

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Outlook accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: outlook_forward
tools.description: Create a draft forwarding an Outlook message to another recipient, preserving attachments. Microsoft Graph handles attachment forwarding natively.

comment.description: Optional text to include with the forwarded message

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Outlook accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.
